title: Bridge Essay: Evaluating Brain Activity in Response to Short Meditation Stimuli Using R-Score, Electroencephalography, and Neural Networks.
concept: Mantra as cognitive technology — predictive processing of language, inner speech as self-modeling.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Language/Mantra** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Mantra as cognitive technology — predictive processing of language, inner speech as self-modeling.

**Evaluating Brain Activity in Response to Short Meditation Stimuli Using R-Score, Electroencephalography, and Neural Networks.** - Annals of neurosciences (2025). DOI: 10.1177/09727531251379925. PMID: 41116809. BACKGROUND: Stress is a major problem in today's culture, especially for expectant mothers. Newer therapies that show promising avenues for the reduction of stress include sound therapy, yoga, mantra chanting, and meditation (M). Electroencephalography (EEG) electroencephalography plays an important role in understanding the relaxation effects caused by these practices.
